verse_text: 'These things which you see-the days will come in which not one stone shall be left upon another that shall not be thrown down.'

links.context: The charge that Jesus would destroy the temple was leveled against Him at His trial ([[MAT.26:61]]) by false witnesses. This was a misinterpretation of two of His sayings: (1) "Destroy this temple, and in three days I will raise it up" ([[JOH.2:19]])--referring to His own body; and (2) His prophecy of the destruction of the temple ([[LUK.21:6]], [[LUK.21:20]]). This prophecy was fulfilled in AD 70, when the Romans destroyed the temple as punishment for a Jewish rebellion.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
